creator: nb_root@videotron.ca
text:
I am no longer able to connect to MSN with kopete since (I assume) upgrades were made to OpenSSL in -CURRENT. On my -STABLE machines, kopete connects fine. I get no errors, simply a "msn flapping butterfly" within kopete indicating network activity and then it returns to gray (no connection). 

I have tried to see what it is doing with wireshark (aka ethereal) and this is what I get:

No.     Time        Source                Destination           Protocol Info
      1 0.000000    192.168.1.100         24.200.241.37         DNS      Standard query A messenger.hotmail.com
      2 0.000720    192.168.1.100         24.200.241.37         DNS      Standard query AAAA messenger.hotmail.com
